description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly black and red camouflage finish, making it suitable for urban environments. The weapon has a folding skeleton stock, allowing for easier maneuverability in tight spaces. Its body is constructed from metal with polymer components, and it includes a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a standard-length barrel, with a visible muzzle device at the end. A detachable box magazine is present beneath the receiver, and the fore-end appears to have an under-barrel attachment, possibly a grenade launcher or tactical accessory. The overall build suggests a modern, military-style firearm optimized for close-quarters combat.
description: A compact, black and red camouflaged tactical rifle with a folding skeleton stock, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. It features a pistol grip and an under-barrel attachment, giving it a modern, urban combat appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, iron front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the folding skeleton stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and the full length of the under-barrel attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's structure, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the folding stock, magazine, and under-barrel attachment from the other side.
